spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
spacing_and_layout.grid_class: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

surface_strategy: GRID BORDERS (The Technical Look) - Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders, no shadows. Expose the grid where possible. Use sharp edges.

components.buttons: rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] px-6 py-3 transition-colors bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A]
components.inputs: rounded-none border border-gray-200 focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7] bg-transparent
components.cards: border border-gray-200 bg-white p-6 rounded-none flex flex-col gap-4
components.charts: Recharts or custom SVG with sharp tooltips (rounded-none, border-black).
components.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 hover:border-[#002FA7] transition-colors bg-gray-50 p-12 text-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer min-h-[300px]

motion.page_transition: Use framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}

accessibility.contrast_standard: APCA minimums met. Text on primary color must be pure white.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left side: Login form, stark white, heavy typography. Right side: login_background image with subtle grain overlay.

/upload/naukri.layout: Centered upload zone with progress indicator. Top left page title.

/upload/pipeline.layout: Centered upload zone with progress indicator. Top left page title.

/dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation + Bento grid content. Top left: North Star Metric. Top right: Job Role Filter. Middle: Funnel Visualization.

login_background.description: Abstract white geometric architecture for login split screen background

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts framer-motion
Implement Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body via font faces or google fonts if available, fallback to Inter and JetBrains Mono if not.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout; use Shadcn UI for interactive elements (Dropdown, Select) but strip border-radius to 0 (rounded-none).
Do NOT use soft shadows. Rely on 1px borders and high contrast backgrounds. This is a brutalist swiss design.
Implement the Funnel chart using Recharts or a custom SVG polygon. Ensure stages are visually distinct using the chart_palette.
Ensure all data-testids are added to interactive elements.
